proven.claim: Proven: "explain" appears in help (line 545) AND is implemented as
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 545
; Proven: "explain" appears in help (line 545) AND is implemented as
; case "explain": runExplain(rest) in the switch.
(declare-const explain_documented Int)
(declare-const explain_implemented Int)
(assert (= explain_documented 1))
(assert (= explain_implemented 1))
(assert (not (= explain_documented explain_implemented)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — explain is both documented and implemented
